actualAnalyzerRoles: combat_body, combat_support, copy_support, multiplier_support, replacement_engine, token_support
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: When The Fish Brewer enters the battlefield or attacks, create a 1/1 Fish creature token that's all colors. If another permanent entering the battlefield causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, tap any number of Fish you control. That ability triggers an additional time for each Fish tapped this way.

name: The Curve Keeper
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: Creatures you control get +X/+0, where X is the greatest number of consecutive nonland, nontoken permanents in a mana curve you control. (For example, if you have permanents with mana value 3, 4, and 5, creatures you control get+3/+0. If you're missing 4, they only get +1/+0.)

name: The Disciple of Vess

oracleText: Whenever The Disciple of Vess attacks, you may put a planeswalker card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you don't, create a token that's a copy of a Liliana planeswalker chosen at random. (There are currently thirteen. Perhaps look up the list and roll a D20?)

name: The Keeper of Favorite Cards
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.

name: The Collector
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: Whenever you cast a signed spell or play a signed land, copy it. (A signed card is a card signed by its artist, designer, or someone else it's strongly associated with.) Discard a signed card: Destroy target creature with a name that has a five or fewer letter length difference from the person who signed the discarded card.
